message:
Extract SpeedScoreBadge to standalone component with tests

- Create speed-score-badge.tsx with enhanced tooltip showing component
  breakdown (CPU/Memory/Disk/Network/Compilation scores)
- Export utility functions: getScoreLevel, getScoreLabel, getScoreColorClass,
  calculateTrend for reuse across the codebase
- Add three size variants (sm/md/lg) and all states (loading/error/empty/normal)
- Refactor worker-card.tsx to import the new component, removing ~180 lines
  of duplicated code
- Add 50 comprehensive unit tests covering all functionality

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
